title: Inside Andy Burnham’s 1st Day as U.K. Prime Minister
summary_full: As Andy Burnham became Britain’s seventh leader in a decade on Monday, he tried to show that he will govern differently.
summary_public: As Andy Burnham became Britain’s seventh leader in a decade on Monday, he tried to show that he will govern differently.
